name: Lightspark
description: Global payments API for fiat, stablecoins, and Bitcoin Lightning with instant cross-border payouts.

seo.title: Lightspark — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Lightspark: Global payments API for fiat, stablecoins, and Bitcoin Lightning with instant cross-border payouts.

when_to_use: Instant cross-border payouts using Bitcoin Lightning Network API
Stablecoin payment flows for global B2B and remittance use cases
Programmable fiat and crypto payment layer for fintech infrastructure
Low-latency global settlement via Lightning for high-frequency payment apps

pros: Bitcoin Lightning rails with fiat UX abstracted
Instant cross-border at low marginal cost
cons: Lightning adoption still early for mainstream
review.verdict: Interesting bet if you need instant cross-border payouts and believe Lightning plus stablecoins are the future.
review.best_for: Platforms making cross-border payouts who want Lightning and stablecoin rails
review.not_for: Teams needing traditional card acceptance or wary of crypto rails
